name: Orange Cappuccino Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine nuts, 2 tablespoons sugar, and butter in a medium bowl; mix well. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Remove from oven. Increase oven temperature to 450°F.
4. Beat together cream cheese, remaining 1 cup sugar, and flour in a large bowl until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Blend in sour cream. Add coffee powder and cinnamon to orange juice; stir until coffee is dissolved.
5. Gradually add the juice mixture with orange peel to the cream cheese mixture, mixing until well blended. Pour over crust.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F. Continue baking cheesecake for 1 hour.
7. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool for 10 minutes. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar. Lightly score top of cheesecake with a sharp knife. Cool completely before removing rim of pan.
8. Spoon desired amount of whipped cream into pastry tube and pipe around edge of cheesecake. Sprinkle with orange zest, if desired.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
